task_title: Evaluation — in-sample baseline and parameter sensitivity (all 6 strategies, RELIANCE, 2018-2023)

marcus.summary: Marcus calls: (1) find the best Sharpe within the ≥30-trade valid region first, then apply 80% threshold to that valid-region peak — not the global peak; if no parameter achieves ≥30 trades, flag and use default params for universe sweep. (2) Keep 80% threshold unchanged. (3) If all valid-region Sharpes are negative, flag as sensitivity concern but record least-bad param as orientation; fall back to strategy defaults for universe sweep rather than a loss-minimizing parameter.

priya_plan.plan_summary: Both cmd/backtest and cmd/sweep already have all 6 strategies wired — the reported missing-strategy blocker is stale. Two real gaps: (1) both CLIs hardcode CommissionZerodha; acceptance criteria require CommissionZerodhaFull — implement --commission flag (TASK-0060 pulled forward) with ParseCommissionModel extracted to internal/cmdutil; (2) internal/sweep.computePlateau uses global peak Sharpe — Marcus's verdict requires applying 80% floor against the valid-region peak (entries with TradeCount >= 30). Update computePlateau, add SensitivityConcern to PlateauRange/Report, write new test cases first. After code gate passes, run 6 baseline backtest commands and 6 sweep commands, save to runs/baseline-2026-04-29/, produce plateau-params.json.
priya_plan.approach: TDD order: (1) write failing tests for valid-region plateau logic in sweep_test.go; (2) write failing test for ParseCommissionModel; (3) implement computePlateau changes; (4) implement ParseCommissionModel in cmdutil and wire --commission flag into both CLIs; (5) run quality gate.

build.build_summary: Added --commission flag to cmd/backtest and cmd/sweep with ParseCommissionModel extracted to internal/cmdutil. Updated internal/sweep.computePlateauWithMinTrades to apply 80% Sharpe floor against the valid-region peak (TradeCount >= MinTradesForPlateau=30). Added SensitivityConcern field to Report. Refactored into filterByMinTrades, peakSharpe, and accumulatePlateau helpers. Both cmd binaries default to CommissionZerodha (preserving existing behavior). Iterate step: added TestReport_SensitivityConcern_AllNegativeValidRegion, fixed --strategy flag help strings in both CLIs.
